name: codexresets
description: CodexResets is a privacy-conscious planner for Codex usage limits and saved resets.

scripts.check: node --check src/cli.mjs && node --check src/auth.mjs && node --check src/history.mjs && node --check src/report.mjs && node --check scripts/scan-secrets.mjs && bash -n install.sh codexresets.sh check-reset-credits.sh
